text_original: Some words are not allowed even if they are censored... Not good for redaction and immersion
text_zh: 有些词即使被审查了也是不被允许的……这不利于编辑和沉浸感。
reply_original: Hi! I understand how content restrictions can break the immersion. To comply with Google Play policies, we must maintain certain filters, but we are constantly fine-tuning them to be more "intelligent" and less intrusive for roleplay. If you encounter specific words that feel unfairly blocked, please email us at support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 你好！我理解内容限制可能会破坏沉浸感。为了遵守 Google Play 的政策，我们必须保留某些过滤器，但我们正在不断对其进行微调，使其更加“智能”，并减少对角色扮演的干扰。如果您遇到某些词汇被不合理地屏蔽，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。
